# scripts/generate_per_process_docs.py
# auto-generated explainer · 2026-06-12T10:00:20Z

## Purpose
generate_per_process_docs.py — drop a per-process doc stub for every process in the blueprint.

Per operator instructions (2026-06-08 · accumulated):
Every process MUST have all 19 mandatory sections in `process-detail.md`:
  1. Problem explanation
  2. AS-IS flow (manual today)
  3. TO-BE flow (automated target)
  4. Impact analysis (productivity + cost + revenue · detailed)
  5. AI capabilities (from blueprint)
  6. User demo flow (per process · operator-runnable)
  7. Simulation tab (what-if scenarios)
  8. Manual process workbench (data/model/accuracy/HP picker)
  9. Automatic process pipeline (Celery/LangGraph DAG)
 10. Phase tracking (threshold · score · update · QC · status)
 11. Final testing + summary report generation
 12. Cron jobs + DB update list
 13. Database layers (graph + vector + historical)
 14. RAG evaluation + DeepEval
 15. Vector DB ingestion cron
 16. Per-operation universal audit (input/process/output/log/trace/prompt)
 17. Crash recovery (every state change saved before continue)
 18. Comprehensive testing matrix (UI/API/data/model/accuracy/output/chunking/agent/orchestration/mCP/Ragas/DeepEval/PII)
 19. Statistical + DBA + management analysis (ResAI · ExpAI · etc.)

Outputs: docs/processes/<dept_slug>/<process_slug>/process-detail.md (322 files).
Idempotent. --force to overwrite. --dry-run to preview.

- from `__future__` import annotations
- from `_` import argparse
- from `_` import json
- from `_` import re
- from `_` import sys
- from `pathlib` import Path

- CLI args: --force, --dry-run, --limit

### Functions
- `slugify(s)`: (no docstring)
- `render(dept, proc)`: (no docstring)
- `main()`: (no docstring)
